nodes.label: Offline-First Room SSOT
nodes.rationale: Room is used as the local Single Source of Truth so the app stays responsive offline; sync status transitions (PENDING_INSERT/FAILED/SYNCED) reconcile with Supabase later.

nodes.label: AppContainer Dependency Injection
nodes.rationale: Chosen over Dagger Hilt to avoid KSP code-generation build overhead and APK bloat in a single-module app; singletons managed via a lightweight service-locator AppContainer.

links.source_location: Finding 3 (AppContainer proposed as alternative to Hilt)
Finding 8 recommends DI layer for shared client
